Comfortable Accommodation: Soley in Port Louis offers a two-bedroom, two-bathroom apartment with free WiFi and free on-site private parking. The property features a fully equipped kitchen, washing machine, and TV, ensuring a pleasant stay.

Spacious Accommodation: Sky View Penthouse in Moka offers a spacious apartment with three bedrooms and three bathrooms. The property features a terrace, balcony, and a private pool. Guests enjoy garden and mountain views.
Outdoor Facilities: The apartment includes a year-round outdoor swimming pool, a terrace, and a garden. Free WiFi is available throughout the property. Additional amenities include a fitness room, outdoor seating area, and free on-site private parking.
Comfort and Convenience: The apartment is equipped with air-conditioning, a fully fitted kitchen, washing machine, and a dining area. Free on-site private parking is provided. Guests can enjoy an ﾃδ la carte breakfast and access to a paid shuttle service, car hire, and full-day security.
